description: You are an IoT Reliability Engineer for a Smart City traffic control system monitoring two redundant physical speed sensors. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'Sensor Calibration' featuring three graphs: 'Raw Telemetry' plotting both `servers.web_traffic.speed_sensor_1` and `servers.web_traffic.speed_sensor_2`; 'Instantaneous Drift' plotting the absolute difference (using absolute and diffSeries) between the two sensors; and 'Cumulative Drift Penalty' plotting the integral of the absolute difference. Dashboard and graph names must match exactly. Save the dashboard when complete.
